capital_note: Hard ceiling is config.capital_ceiling_usd (USD 200). Prefer ~$0 start.
market_scope: Mexico (MX) ONLY for now. Target Mexican consumers/businesses in Spanish. Do NOT target the US, US-Hispanic, or other markets.
legal_note: No active US LLC (Delaware entity lapsed for non-payment). Do NOT rely on US-only seller programs that need US tax/entity standing (e.g. Merch by Amazon, which sells on amazon.com, not amazon.com.mx). Operate as a Mexico-based seller (RFC) on MX-accessible channels.
target_channels: Etsy (digital + POD; smaller MX buyer base)
Tiendanube or own Shopify for MX with MercadoPago checkout
market_analysis_requirement: For ANY marketplace stream, run Helium-10-grade market analysis BEFORE committing: MX demand/search-volume signals, competition (listing counts, top-seller review/sales signals, saturation), MXN pricing & net margin (incl. POD base cost + MX fulfillment/shipping), keyword/niche gaps, and MX seasonality (El Buen Fin, Hot Sale, Dia de las Madres May 10, Navidad/Reyes, Dia de Muertos).
unfair_advantages: Proven physical-product / Amazon operator at scale (prior mug venture ~$100k first month)
Bilingual EN/ES with proven Mexico-market sales success (less competition in ES-language niches)
hard_nos: Anything requiring large paid-ad spend to work
Anything that depends on the US market or a US legal entity (out of scope for now)
